purpose: Regression prompts for IFQ Design Skills. Each scenario protects a mode route, a human-facing outcome, and the agent contract needed to produce a shippable HTML-first artifact.
quality_principles: Make the user more effective in one prompt, not more responsible for prompt engineering.
Give agents a short route, concrete files to read, a forkable template, and a verification command.
Let AI do the deterministic work: fact-check, route, fork, clean placeholders, verify, and prepare export only when requested.
Prefer visible craft, factual grounding, and export reliability over ornamental novelty.
Keep Tier 0 zero-install unless the prompt explicitly asks for screenshots or export formats.

scenarios.prompt_zh: 24 秒硬件发布片头，冷静，像 Teenage Engineering，不要发布会预热。
scenarios.prompt_en: A 24-second hardware launch opener. Cool, like Teenage Engineering. Not a pre-announcement hype reel.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets a timed motion concept with a usable keyposter and export path, not just visual mood words.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent has a fixed motion route, timeline references, and a Tier 0 preview before optional export.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 for HTML preview; Tier 2 only when MP4/GIF is requested

must_include: key visual or product placeholder protocol
motion phases with readable text dwell time
IFQ ambient marks woven into framing
must_not: install export dependencies unless export is requested
claim product specs without fact checking

scenarios.prompt_zh: 个人站一页，但不要像找工作。
scenarios.prompt_en: One-page personal site, but I do not want it to look like I am job-hunting.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets a personal presence with a point of view instead of a resume template.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent routes to directions first, then forks the landing template with clear content slots.

must_include: three differentiated directions when style is vague
must_not: ask for unnecessary secrets or accounts

scenarios.prompt_zh: 2026 AI agent 白皮书，50 页内，直接印。
scenarios.prompt_en: A 2026 AI-agent whitepaper under 50 pages, ready to print.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets a print-minded document structure with source discipline.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent knows to fact-check claims, build printable HTML first, then export only when asked.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 for HTML; Tier 2 for PDF export

must_not: promise PDF export without running the export path

scenarios.prompt_zh: 内部 AI 做一个 command center，像 Bloomberg 终端，不要 BI 套壳。
scenarios.prompt_en: Internal AI command center. Bloomberg-terminal density. Not a BI skin.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets an operational interface that supports repeated scanning and action.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent is anchored to the dashboard template and density rules instead of card-heavy decoration.

verification: manual scan for responsive density and no overlap

scenarios.prompt_zh: 路演要一张 A vs B，我们对三家友商，一眼看出为什么选我们，不许吹。
scenarios.prompt_en: A vs B for the roadshow. Us against three competitors. Make it obvious why us. No bragging.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets a defensible comparison that can survive investor scrutiny.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent is forced into evidence-first comparison rather than unchecked persuasion copy.

must_not: explicit rival-name copy unless supplied by the user

scenarios.prompt_zh: 做一个 Habit Tracker App 原型。
scenarios.prompt_en: Make a Habit Tracker app prototype.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets multiple concrete screens that expose product depth.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent uses the device frame and overview/flow routing instead of hand-rolling a phone shell.

verification: manual click pass for tab/detail flow

must_include: 5-7 screens or a justified smaller flow
must_not: fake Dynamic Island drawn from scratch

scenarios.prompt_zh: 这周 4 个更新，做成纵向 changelog，要像活页笔记，别像公告栏。
scenarios.prompt_en: Four updates shipped this week. Make a vertical changelog that feels like a loose-leaf notebook, not a company bulletin board.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets release communication that feels authored and scannable.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent routes to a timeline template with explicit release-item slots.

scenarios.prompt_zh: 明天沙龙讲 AI agent 20 分钟，给我一份 deck，不要像 SaaS keynote，要有书卷气。
scenarios.prompt_en: Tomorrow I am giving a 20-minute salon on AI agents. Give me a deck that does not look like a SaaS keynote and has a bookish voice.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets a talk structure and slide language that can be delivered live.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent starts from deck rules and title-slide template, then varies layouts deliberately.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 for HTML; Tier 2 for PPTX/PDF export

must_not: claim editable PPTX without export verification

scenarios.prompt_zh: 把这条发布说明做成一张 X/Twitter 分享卡。
scenarios.prompt_en: Turn this release note into an X/Twitter share card.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets a platform-sized graphic with one clear message.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent uses the social card template and platform constraints instead of a generic poster.

scenarios.prompt_zh: 朋友独立咖啡店名片，黑白双面，不要花，要有手工感。
scenarios.prompt_en: A friend's indie cafe business card. Two-sided, black-and-white, no flourish, handmade feel.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets a print-aware card concept rather than a screenshot-sized mockup.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent follows print constraints, bleed, and explicit co-brand rules.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 for HTML/SVG; Tier 2 for print PDF export

scenarios.prompt_zh: 帮这个品牌做一次体检，给 3 个升级方向。
scenarios.prompt_en: Audit this brand and give three upgrade directions.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets diagnosis and choices before implementation.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent separates critique from execution and uses scoring criteria.

must_not: redesign immediately when asked only to audit

scenarios.prompt_zh: 从零建立一个 AI 工具品牌系统，含落地页和社媒物料。
scenarios.prompt_en: Build an AI-tool brand system from scratch, including a landing page and social assets.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets a usable system across applications, not a loose logo idea.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent can stage brand foundations, templates, and follow-up exports without losing the source of truth.

scenarios.prompt_zh: 用我们现有的品牌 assets 做一个 30 秒产品发布视频，品牌色是 #2563EB。
scenarios.prompt_en: Use our existing brand assets to make a 30-second product launch video. Brand color is #2563EB.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets a launch film that uses their actual brand system, not IFQ defaults.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent knows to override IFQ accent with user-supplied brand color and source real assets before animating.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 for HTML; Tier 2 for MP4

scenarios.prompt_zh: 把这份 CSV 数据做成一个运营 dashboard，要能看到趋势和异常。
scenarios.prompt_en: Turn this CSV data into an operations dashboard. I need to see trends and anomalies.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets a data-driven dashboard, not a decorative mockup with fake numbers.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent parses real data, maps fields to chart slots, and highlights anomalies with color semantics.

must_not: decorative charts with no data source

scenarios.prompt_zh: 做一个跨 iOS、Android 和 Web 的 onboarding 流程原型。
scenarios.prompt_en: Make an onboarding flow prototype that works across iOS, Android, and Web.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets platform-aware screens that respect each platform's conventions.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent uses device frames and platform-specific UI patterns instead of one-size-fits-all.

scenarios.prompt_zh: 做一份 15 页的 AI 趋势演讲 deck，要能导出 PPTX 给同事用。
scenarios.prompt_en: Make a 15-slide AI trends keynote deck. I need to export it as PPTX for my colleague.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets both an HTML preview and a verified editable PPTX file.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent builds HTML deck first, verifies it, then runs PPTX export only after HTML is approved.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 for HTML; Tier 2 for PPTX

must_not: claim PPTX exists without running export

scenarios.prompt_zh: 这条产品更新做一套社媒物料：X、小红书、LinkedIn 三个平台。
scenarios.prompt_en: Turn this product update into a social media kit: X, Xiaohongshu, and LinkedIn.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets three platform-optimized cards from one content source.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent generates all three sizes from the same content, respecting each platform's aspect ratio and text density.

must_not: identical layout scaled to different sizes

scenarios.prompt_zh: 我们已有品牌指南 PDF，帮我扩展到数字触点：网站、App、社媒。
scenarios.prompt_en: We have a brand guidelines PDF. Help me extend it to digital touchpoints: website, app, social.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets digital applications of their existing brand, not a new brand from scratch.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent extracts tokens from existing guidelines and applies them to digital templates.

must_include: extracted brand tokens from existing guidelines
must_not: override user's brand with IFQ defaults

scenarios.prompt_zh: 帮我做点好看的东西，我也不确定要什么，给我几个方向看看。
scenarios.prompt_en: Make me something that looks good. I am not sure what I want — show me a few directions.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets 3 concrete directions to choose from instead of a generic template.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent uses the Design Direction Advisor to create choice, not guess.

agent_contract.route: Design Direction Advisor -> propose 3 -> user picks -> M-02

must_include: each direction with a clear name and visual description

scenarios.prompt_zh: 刚才那个 dashboard 的数字太小了，把 KPI 区域放大，配色改成深色主题。
scenarios.prompt_en: The numbers on that dashboard are too small. Make the KPI section bigger and switch to a dark theme.
scenarios.user_value: The human gets targeted edits to their existing artifact, not a rebuild from scratch.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent locates the previous file, makes surgical edits, re-verifies, and reports exactly what changed.
